internationalizations.description:
I am a Master's student in International Agricultural Technology at Seoul National University, with a Double Major in Applied Data Science. My research focuses on agricultural economics, consumer behavior, and international development, particularly in Southeast Asia and beyond.

My journey into research began during my undergraduate studies in Russian at Hankuk University of Foreign Studies. After serving as a First Lieutenant in the Republic of Korea Army, I pursued graduate studies and have since been deeply engaged in applied economic research — analyzing consumer willingness-to-pay, conducting large-scale field surveys, and evaluating the feasibility of agricultural programs in developing countries.

I have had the opportunity to collaborate with institutions such as the Vietnam National University of Agriculture, KOICA, and the Rural Development Administration, working on projects spanning school milk programs in Laos, gene-edited food markets in Vietnam, and IRG seed production feasibility in Korea.

I am passionate about bridging the gap between academic research and real-world policy, and I am always eager to learn, collaborate, and contribute to meaningful impact.

Sou estudante de Mestrado em Tecnologia Agrícola Internacional na Universidade Nacional de Seul, com Dupla Especialização em Ciência de Dados Aplicada. Minha pesquisa se concentra em economia agrícola, comportamento do consumidor e desenvolvimento internacional, particularmente no Sudeste Asiático.

Minha jornada na pesquisa começou durante minha graduação em Russo na Universidade Hankuk de Estudos Estrangeiros. Após servir como Primeiro-Tenente no Exército da República da Coreia, ingressei na pós-graduação e tenho me dedicado a pesquisas econômicas aplicadas — analisando a disposição a pagar dos consumidores, realizando pesquisas de campo em larga escala e avaliando a viabilidade de programas agrícolas em países em desenvolvimento.
